name: snakebyte
description: Local bot and optimization workspace for CodinGame Winter Challenge 2026.

scripts.docker:npm-install: docker compose run --rm dev npm install
scripts.docker:engine-install: docker compose run --rm dev mvn -f engine/pom.xml install -DskipTests
scripts.docker:bootstrap: docker compose run --rm dev bash -lc "npm install && mvn -f engine/pom.xml install -DskipTests"
scripts.docker:match: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:ts
scripts.docker:match:starter: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:starter
scripts.docker:match:vs-starter: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:vs-starter
scripts.docker:match:self: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:self
scripts.docker:match:debug: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:debug
scripts.docker:match:diagnostics: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:diagnostics --
scripts.docker:match:lookahead: docker compose run --rm dev npm run match:lookahead
scripts.docker:parity: docker compose run --rm dev npm run parity
scripts.docker:ga:run: docker compose run --rm dev npm run ga:run
scripts.docker:ga:smoke: docker compose run --rm dev npm run ga:smoke
scripts.docker:ga:train: docker compose run --rm dev npm run ga:train
